expert_pool: The text asks to activate or set up a card.
The text asks when a card will arrive or be delivered.
The text reports that a card is not working.
The text reports a problem with contactless or tap payments.
The text asks to change or reset a card PIN.
The text says the PIN is blocked or the passcode was forgotten.
The text reports a lost, stolen, or compromised card.
The text says a card was retained or swallowed by a machine.
The text requests a refund or reports a refund not showing up.
The text reports a card payment that was declined.
The text asks about a fee or an extra charge on a payment or statement.
The text reports being charged twice or an unexpected extra charge.
The text asks about the exchange rate applied to a transaction.
The text asks how long a transfer takes or why it is delayed.
The text asks to cancel a transfer or reports a failed transfer.
The text asks about top-up limits or how much can be added.
The text asks to verify identity or provide proof of identity.
The text asks to close, terminate, or delete an account.
The text asks how to get or order a physical card.
The text asks about ATM support or cash withdrawal charges.
The text asks about Apple Pay, Google Pay, or adding a card to a phone.
The text asks whether a card works in a particular country.
The text asks whether Visa or Mastercard is supported.
The text asks to edit or update personal details.
